statement: Backup vs official version history — JSON backup is a personal safety backup, not official version history. — Affects backup metadata, activity logs, version history model.
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User sees it as recovery tool, not a
